data.text: A FELYSIAN WORLD, ONE OF ONLY A HANDFUL OUTSIDE THE FARHOME SYSTEM IN
THIS AREA OF THE GALAXY. THE GRAVITY AND PRESSURE ARE BOTH QUITE LOW,
0.800/0.700, AND TEMPERATURES ARE MODERATE AT BEST. THE PLANET APPEARS
GREEN FROM ORBIT, WITH NOT MUCH OF THE SURFACE BEING WATER.
11.14:AN ENORMOUS VALLEY, MOST LIKELY CARVED OUT BY A GLACIER
